currentDeployableObjects.description: Currently existing deployable objects for this component

identifier.description: Declaration identifier. Required for ASSET declaration type, for other types the identifier is automatically generated by Blueprint engine.

deployableObjects.description: Existing deployable objects for this component

AssetDataReference.description: A reference to arbitrary data with a specific media type.

ContentType.description: The media type that describes the data.

DataURL.description: The URL that hosts the credential data. The URL must start with 'https://'.

Hash-SHA-256.description: A SHA-256 hash of the data at the 'DataURL'.

Size.description: The size of the data at the 'DataURL'.

ServiceConfigurationFilesConfiguration.description: Specifies managed configuration files for services

ServiceType.description: The identifier of the system service with managed configuration files.

currentDeployableObjects.description: Currently existing deployable objects for this component
Currently existing deployable objects for this component

Value.description: The policy Safari uses for managing cookies
If false, the system forces fraud warnings on in Safari
If false, the system disables clearing history in Safari
If false, the system disables JavaScript in Safari
If false, the system disables popups in Safari
If false, the system disables private browsing in Safari
If false, the system disables summarization of content in Safari

PageType.description: Sets the start page type in Safari

HomepageURL.description: The URL of the homepage which needs to start with https:// or http://

ExtensionIdentifier.description: The composed identifier of the extension that provides the start page

AcceptCookies.description: The policy Safari uses for managing cookies

AllowDisablingFraudWarning.description: If false, the system forces fraud warnings on in Safari

AllowHistoryClearing.description: If false, the system disables clearing history in Safari

AllowJavaScript.description: If false, the system disables JavaScript in Safari

AllowPrivateBrowsing.description: If false, the system disables private browsing in Safari

AllowPopups.description: If false, the system disables popups in Safari

AllowSummary.description: If false, the system disables summarization of content in Safari

NewTabStartPage.description: Sets the start page for new tabs in Safari

GroupIdentifier.description: A string that specifies the unique identifier for this group of managed bookmarks

Title.description: The name of the bookmarks folder
The title of the folder shown in Safari

Folder.description: An array of bookmarks for each bookmark in the folder

ManagedBookmarks.description: A dictionary that specifies a set of managed bookmarks

Title.description: The title of the bookmark shown in Safari

URL.description: The URL for the bookmark item

Description.description: Map of OS language ID to a localized description. Use the special `default` key for languages that the dictionary doesn't contain.

AddSquareRoot.description: Add the square root button to the basic calculator by replacing the +/- button.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

BasicMode.description: If present, configures the basic mode of the calculator. Basic mode is always enabled.

ScientificMode.description: If present, configures the scientific mode of the calculator. If not present, scientific mode is enabled.

ProgrammerMode.description: If present, configures the programmer mode of the calculator. If not present, programmer mode is enabled.

MathNotesMode.description: If present, configures the Math Notes mode of the calculator. If not present, math notes mode is enabled.

InputModes.description: If present, controls global input options of the calculator. If not present, all input modes are enabled.

UnitConversion.description: Configures whether unit conversions are enabled.

RPN.description: Configures whether RPN input is enabled.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

Enabled.description: Controls whether the mode is enabled.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

Calculator.description: If present, configures the built-in Calculator app.

SystemBehavior.description: If present, configures math behavior in the system.

Enabled.description: Controls whether the mode is enabled.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

Enabled.description: Controls whether the mode is enabled.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

KeyboardSuggestions.description: Controls whether keyboard suggestions include math solutions.

MathNotes.description: Controls whether Math Notes is allowed in other apps such as Notes.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

TemporaryPairing.description: A dictionary that describes audio accessory temporary pairing behavior.

UnpairingTime.description: A dictionary that describes when the device automatically unpairs temporarily paired audio accessories.

Disabled.description: If true, temporary pairing of audio accessories is disabled.

Configuration.description: A dictionary providing configuration for temporary pairing. Required if Disabled isn't present or is false.

Included.description: Controls whether this control should be used.

Policy.description: A string that specifies the device's unpairing policy.

Hour.description: The local time hour (24-hour clock) when the device automatically unpairs temporarily paired audio accessories. Required when setting the Policy key to Hour.
